platform.description: Prediction market platform. Examples: kalshi, polymarket.

market_question.description: The exact market question as stated on the platform.

resolution_date.description: Date on which the market resolves.

contract_price_cents.description: Price per contract in cents at time of entry. Range 1-99.

resolution_outcome.description: Final resolution result. Populated at close.

edge_thesis.description: Why the market price is wrong. What is the edge?
